description: maif.github.io is the GitHub Pages site for MAIF open-source projects, including Otoroshi, Nio, Meteole, and Arta. It publishes project documentation and download/getting-started guides for self-hosted tools rather than a single hosted API service on maif.github.io itself.
summary: maif.github.io mainly hosts documentation and project pages for MAIF open-source software; the only programmatic developer surface documented on this domain is the self-hosted Otoroshi Admin REST API, and its auth is documented only partially.
